docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SETIAWAN, MARGARETHA AS TO DEFENDANT KUPU, SOLOMONE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SOLOMON'S ENTERPRISE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
